proposals.title: File duplication in code generation output
proposals.lesson: Code generation produced duplicate files: - `ReadinessScore.kt`: 6 copies with field drift (`categoryScores` default, `recommendedFocus` field). Extraction pipeline needs deduplication.
proposals.reason: Recurring failure patterns should be captured to prevent repetition in future projects.

proposals.title: SwiftUI lifecycle pattern: memory leak
proposals.lesson: Generated SwiftUI code missing lifecycle management: memory leak
proposals.reason: Technical patterns detected in reviews can be reused across projects.
